name: Company Media
description: Find company logos, OG images, team photos, product screenshots, and award badges by fetching key pages.
usage_notes: Fetches images from entity websites independently. Increase max_pages_per_entity for large sites with media spread across many sections. Limited to company's own site — does not search external sources.

options.name: find_logo
options.label: Find company logo
options.description: Fetch homepage and look for logo images. Prefers horizontal/dark variants suitable for light backgrounds.

options.name: find_team_photos
options.label: Find team/people photos
options.description: Fetch /about, /team, /leadership pages and extract photos of founders/CEO/key people.

options.name: find_product_screenshots
options.label: Find product screenshots
options.description: Fetch /products, /solutions, /platform pages and extract product/software screenshots.

options.name: find_awards
options.label: Find award badge images
options.description: Look for award-related images on pages mentioning awards or certifications.

options.name: validate_urls
options.label: Validate image URLs
options.description: Send HEAD requests to verify each discovered image URL is accessible.

options.name: max_pages_per_entity
options.label: Max pages to fetch per entity
options.description: Maximum number of pages to fetch per entity (homepage + subpages).
